password_reset.answer: You can reset your password by clicking Forgot Password on the login page.

support_hours.answer: Support is available Monday to Friday from 9 AM to 5 PM.

refund_policy.answer: Refunds are accepted within 30 days with a valid receipt.

shipping_time.answer: Standard shipping takes 5 to 7 business days.

contact_info.answer: Call us at 555-1234 or email aupport@example.com.
